zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Venables於1256年出生在英國爾諾維其時，他的父親William Baron of Kinderton De Venables,11歲，母親Lady Margaret de Dutton21歲。他於1295年與Agatha de Vernon在英國爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1311年4月25日在英國爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh de Venables于1256年出生在英国爾諾維其时，他的父亲William Baron of Kinderton De Venables,11岁，母亲Lady Margaret de Dutton21岁。他于1295年与Agatha de Vernon在英国爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1311年4月25日在英国爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Venables was born in 1256, in Northwich, Cheshire, England, his father, William Baron of Kinderton De Venables,, was 11 and his mother, Lady Margaret de Dutton, was 21. He married Agatha de Vernon in 1295, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 25 April 1311, in Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Venables est né en 1256, à Northwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William Baron of Kinderton De Venables,, avait 11 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret de Dutton, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Agatha de Vernon en 1295, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 25 avril 1311, à Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.Kinderton Cum Hulme, Northwich, Cheshire: Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Venables 1256 in Northwich, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Baron of Kinderton De Venables, 11 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret de Dutton 21. Er hat 1295 in Cheshire, England Agatha de Vernon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 25. April 1311 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England.

Lui sposato Agatha de Vernon nel 1295, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 25 aprile 1311, nel Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Venablesが1256年にイギリスチェシュアイアノースウィチで生まれた時，父William Baron of Kinderton De Venables,は11歳，母Lady Margaret de Duttonは21歳であった。1295年にイギリスチェシュアイアでAgatha de Vernonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1311年4月25日にイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトン クウム ハルメで55歳で死去した。

ko.Kinderton Cum Hulme, Northwich, Cheshire: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨더턴 쿠 훌
ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Venables(이)가 1256년 영국 체실르 노르스위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Baron of Kinderton De Venables,(은)는 11세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret de Dutton(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1295년 영국 체실르에서 Agatha de Vernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1311년 4월 25일 영국 체실르 킨더턴 쿠 훌에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Venables nasceu em 1256, em Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Baron of Kinderton De Venables,, tinha 11 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret de Dutton, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Agatha de Vernon em 1295, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de abril de 1311, em Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.Kinderton Cum Hulme, Northwich, Cheshire: киндиртон кум хулм, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Venables родился в 1256 г. в местности нортвич, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Baron of Kinderton De Venables, было 11 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret de Dutton, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Agatha de Vernon в 1295 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер 25 апреля 1311 г. в местности киндиртон кум хулм, чешир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

Se casó con Agatha de Vernon en 1295, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 8 hijas.
